parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_run WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS total_workflow_runs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_run WHERE status='failed' AND started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS workflow_errors,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_analysis WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS tickets_classified,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_draft WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS drafts_created,
  (SELECT AVG(rating) FROM feedback WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS avg_rating,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE draft_was_used = true AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS drafts_used,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM feedback WHERE draft_was_used = false AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS drafts_rejected,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM voice_message WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS voice_messages,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audit_log WHERE action = 'ticket.escalated' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS escalations
